module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent loop engine interface with backend type selection, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoint, public model request interface, Deepseek backend implementation through common external namespaces, and future retrieval/tool interfaces.

childModules.name: engine
childModules.purpose: Agent loop engine public interface for per-session construction by backend type, internal session context ownership, task contexts, and task outcomes.

childModules.name: frontdoor
childModules.purpose: Agent frontdoor session endpoint backed by remoc/TCP with accepted user-message tasks and bidirectional task messaging.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Public model request interface, backend type selection, crate-internal backend implementation boundary, model error definitions, and streaming Deepseek backend implementation through common external namespaces.
